MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-24-2012 IN 206, DEFENDANTS CHARLIE FUSIFUKA SEKONA AND ELITISI SEKONA'S MOTION TO VACATE THE TRIAL DATE, VACATE EARLY SETTLEMENT PROGRAM DATE, AND SET NEW CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. KEVIN SULLIVAN APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANTS MOTION TO VACATE THE TRIAL DATE AND WILL SET THE MATTER ON CASE MANAGEMENT PENDING THE STATUS OF THE CRIMINAL TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/15/12 IS VACATED AND MATTER IS SET FOR CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON 8/15/12 AT 2:00PM IN DEPT. 610. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
